title: AuditVerdictBody v0.4 (Layer 2 lineage extension)
description: HISTORICAL DESIGN SNAPSHOT — NOT LOADED AT RUNTIME. SSOT = src/channels/audit-verdict.ts (types + parsers) + the cli.ts send gate + paired tests. DO NOT EDIT to change behavior; edit the TS and tests. See decisions/cluster-6.md Decision I. | Cycle 1 substrate-extension schema migration 004 — extends v0.2 AuditVerdictBody (schema 002_v0.2.json) with one optional field per Pair A slice plan body §1.1 LOCKED: `lineage?: LineageEnvelope | null` (Layer 2 per-artefact lineage envelope). All v0.2 fields preserved; kind_version stays at literal 1 (purely additive optional field per substrate-precedes-consumer + Sigstore parse-all-versions precedent). Composes with v0.3 DSSE wrapper (schema 003_v0.3.json) per cross-pair contract: the v0.4 body lives INSIDE the DSSE payload bytes; canonicalJson(body) including lineage gets PAE-covered by signPayload → lineage field is signature-covered automatically (composition-lens audit-shadow OBS-COMP-1; empirically verified via Pair-A-PR-A2 T15.8 + T15.9 DSSE wrap-unwrap roundtrip + signature-coverage tests). Send-time validation in cli.ts may require this field when lineage-capture harness integration lands (Cycle 2+); Cycle 1 ships schema-only + opt-in author capture per OQ-A4. See src/channels/lineage-envelope.ts LineageEnvelope type + parseLineageEnvelope function for SSOT parser implementation (Pair-A-PR-A1; see PR #130 + commit message body for SHA citation). See plans/cycle-1-substrate-extension-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §1.1 + §2.5 + §3.1 + §7.1 for envelope shape + parser semantics + lineage-verify CLI contract + sequencing constraints. | STALENESS NOTE (2026-06-11): this snapshot predates #230 D-MIG-1, which dropped target_pr from the internal AuditVerdictBody type; target_pr/target_plan remain WIRE fields only (back-compat). See decisions/cluster-6.md Decision H. This drift went undetected for 13 days because nothing binds these JSON files to the parser — the motivating evidence for Decision I.

kind_version.description: Schema version literal (stays at 1; optional v0.4 lineage field is additive per substrate-precedes-consumer).

cross_edge_consumers_verified.description: Optional readonly string[]; PR #120 introduced; required non-empty for substrate-class PRs per isSubstrateClassPR(target_pr) send-time validation.

signed_at.description: v0.2: ISO-8601 timestamp when the audit-verdict was signed. Required when DSSE-wrapped (post-Migration-003 v0.3); optional/absent on legacy unsigned bodies. Verifier resolves the correct historical pubkey by matching this timestamp against signing NATO's keys/cohort/<nato>.history.json entries (DC-5).

prev_audit_body_ref.description: v0.2: SHA-256 of prior audit-verdict's canonical-JSON payload (in-payload signature-chain pointer per DC-2; resolves OBS-A — HMAC framing was incorrect crypto-primitive naming per Delta Phase 0 fact-base catch). null for bootstrap (first) audit-verdict in a channel per Charlie Obs-5 HYBRID write-side canonical. Absent on legacy v0.1 bodies.

signer_role.description: v0.2: sender's channel role at signing time (queue / driver / out etc; matches JSONL line role field). Signature-covered via PAE per Obs-3 4-NATO cohort HYBRID lock; line-vs-payload cross-check at verify time catches role-tamper attacks. NATO identity attestation is handled by DSSE signatures[i].keyid per HYBRID (no in-payload signer_nato).

lineage.description: v0.4: optional Layer 2 per-artefact lineage envelope. SSOT type at src/channels/lineage-envelope.ts (Pair-A-PR-A1; see PR #130 commit message body for SHA citation). When present + body is DSSE-wrapped (v0.3 schema 003_v0.3.json), the lineage field becomes part of canonical-JSON payload bytes that signPayload signs via PAE → signature-covered automatically (composition-lens OBS-COMP-1). Verifier extracts via parseAuditVerdictV0_3Wrapped → body.lineage. Parser at parseAuditVerdictBody tolerates absent / null / shape-valid envelope; delegates shape validation to parseLineageEnvelope SSOT. See $defs/LineageEnvelope for inline shape.

LineageEnvelope.description: Layer 2 per-artefact lineage envelope (Pair A slice plan body §1.1 LOCKED). 3 required + 5 optional fields. Forward-compat: kind_version-tagged; parser accepts version 1 only (other versions return null per skip semantics). Permissive on extra fields.

kind_version.description: Schema version literal (forward-compat; bumps on incompatible revisions).

producer_session_id.description: Producer session UUID. Authoritative producer attribution at envelope layer (distinct from DSSE signatures[i].keyid which is NATO-scoped; orthogonal identity dimensions).

input_body_refs.description: Body_refs (or content-hashes when body_ref unavailable) of prior artefacts that fed into this one. Empty array allowed (source-of-truth-no-prior-input). Tier-3 RESOLVABILITY checked at lineage-verify time, NOT parse time (substrate-precedes-consumer cadence).

produced_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 production timestamp (distinct from signed_at; for memory + handoff frontmatter, production-time is meaningful even before signing).

input_handoffs.description: Optional list of handoff filenames this artefact was derived from. Distinct from input_body_refs (handoffs aren't body_refs; they're filesystem paths). OQ-A2 resolution: extension field on envelope (uniform across 4 surfaces) rather than handoff-frontmatter-specific top-level field.

prompt_sha.description: Optional SHA256 of the prompt that produced this artefact. Useful for prompt-injection audit class + cross-model audit (B-P0-3 dep). OQ-A4 opt-in Cycle 1.

model.description: Optional model identifier (e.g., claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6). Required for B-P0-3 cross-model audit; optional otherwise. OQ-A4 opt-in Cycle 1.

cost.description: Optional token cost. OQ-A4 opt-in Cycle 1. Note: cost_usd is float per locked spec; canonical-json.ts RFC 8785 subset does NOT implement §3.2.2 full number canonicalization → canonical-encoding non-determinism risk if populated. Cycle 2 substrate-debt path: promote canonical-json.ts to full RFC 8785 OR amend to integer micros. See vault wiki/backlog.md Cycle 2 substrate-debt entry on canonical-json.ts RFC 8785 (or cost_usd to micros migration).

cost_usd.description: Optional cost in USD (float). Cycle 1: opt-in only. If populated, may cause canonical-encoding non-determinism across runtimes per RFC 8785 §3.2.2 subset limitation in canonical-json.ts. Cycle 2 substrate-debt resolution path filed at vault wiki/backlog.md Cycle 2 substrate-debt entry (canonical-json.ts RFC 8785 promotion or TokenCost.cost_usd to integer micros).

x-claude-conductor.supersedes_migration: 002 (v0.2 baseline; raw-body signed fields added). v0.3 (003_v0.3.json) is the outer DSSE envelope, orthogonal axis — v0.4 lives inside the v0.3 payload.
x-claude-conductor.supersedes_migration_note: v0.1 raw-unsigned + v0.2 raw-signed bodies remain valid + parseable per back-compat discipline (parseAuditVerdictBody unchanged + lineage field optional). v0.3 DSSE wrapper unchanged + carries v0.4 body inside its payload field when lineage is populated. Send-side validation may require lineage when harness lineage-capture lands (Cycle 2+); Cycle 1 ships schema-only + opt-in per OQ-A4.
x-claude-conductor.next_migration: TBD per cohort Cycle 2+ (e.g., promote canonical-json.ts to full RFC 8785 §3.2.2 + §3.2.5, OR amend TokenCost.cost_usd to integer micros, OR introduce v0.5 with required lineage for substrate-class PRs)
x-claude-conductor.audit_shadow_pen: Pair A Bravo + Pair B Charlie + Pair B Delta
x-claude-conductor.cross_pair_contract: plans/cycle-1-substrate-core-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §2.6 + §4 (Pair B substrate-core v0.3 DSSE wrapper composability) + plans/cycle-1-substrate-extension-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §1.1 + §2.5 + §3.1 + §7.1 (Pair A Layer 2 lineage envelope SSOT + parser + lineage-verify CLI + sequencing)
x-claude-conductor.cohort_ratify_audit_trail_note: Ratify body_refs + session UUIDs + channel id documented in PR commit message body + cohort channel (not in schema file to keep schema operator-portable + free of bernstein arc-specific anonymization-leak class identifiers per check-generic-paths CGP-001/CGP-004 lessons from PR-A1 v0.2 migration cycle).
